recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: Evil Goddess Eris
recommendations.overview: In the first anime film of the Saint Seiya series, Seiya and the gang must defeat mysterious Ghost Knights to save the world from the pending resurrection of Eris, the Goddess of Chaos!

recommendations.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!: The Dark Side of Dimensions
recommendations.overview: Having faced each other on countless occasions, Yugi and Kaiba again put their pride and experience to the test in a duel that transcends dimensions.

recommendations.title: Alesha Popovich and Tugarin the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Alesha Popovich has to catch Tugarin Zmey and bring back the stolen money with the help of a talking Horse (which talks all the time and has an opinion on everything), a wise granny, a donkey and a beauty Lyubava.

recommendations.title: The Ewok Adventure
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Wicket the Ewok and his friends agree to help two shipwrecked human children, Mace and Cindel, on a quest to find their parents.

recommendations.title: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon?: Arrow of the Orion
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance
recommendations.overview: The goddess Artemis has sworn to destroy a powerful monster lurking in a distant, ancient city, and she needs Bell’s help to do it. But there is more to Artemis’ quest than meets the eye, and victory will not come easily for Bell and all his friends!

recommendations.title: Monkey King: Hero Is Back
recommendations.overview: The all-powerful Monkey King once roamed freely between Heaven and Earth, but after angering the Gods, he was imprisoned within an ice cage deep within the mountains. 500 years later, monsters attack a small village and a child flees to the mountains

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: London, At the Edge of Time
recommendations.overview: To save the future from a terrible fate, Marinette becomes Chronobug and teams up with Bunnyx to defeat a mysterious opponent who travels through time.

recommendations.title: Pokémon: Giratina and the Sky Warrior
recommendations.overview: When Giratina is discovered to be able to create parallel dimensions, it's up to Ash and his friends to stop a mysterious stranger from using its powers for evil.

recommendations.title: Inazuma Eleven the Movie: The Ultimate Force, Team Ogre, Attacks!
recommendations.overview: An organization in the future sends the specially trained Team Ogre to defeat Endou Mamoru and his team, to prevent him from influencing the world with his soccer.

recommendations.title: Inuyasha the Movie 4: Fire on the Mystic Island
recommendations.overview: The mysterious island of Houraijima has reappeared after 50 years, and with its reappearance has brought the attack of four gods, the Shitoushin, who have their eyes set on the powers that protect and sustain the island. Now it's up to Inuyasha and h
